# Epic-mode plan (fixture)

An Epic-scoped artifact (`M4.5.E99-PLAN.md`) as an Epic-mode project writes them
(M4.5.E11.S2.t3). The resolver must find THIS one — via pattern 0
(`{EpicID}-PLAN.md`) — when `current_epic` is `M4.5.E99`, with no "artifact not
found" papercut (the very bug FR1 was the read-half of).
